violations.text: Refrigerator (C6) was in poor repair, non-functional at the time of this inspection. PIC stated work order for repair and/or removal was placed June 2025. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The floor around the refrigerator in the storage room has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The automatic dispenser at the 3-bay sink is dispensing at a concentration higher than 400 ppm. Work order has been placed. Establishment is diluting the 3-bay sink and testing as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
